name: Douyin (TikTok China) MCP Server
what_it_does: Douyin (抖音, the Chinese version of TikTok) MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with the Douyin platform — searching and retrieving video content, fetching creator profiles and statistics, querying trending content, and integrating Douyin's short-form video platform into agent-driven Chinese social media analytics and content research workflows.
use_cases: Searching Douyin for trending video content from social media research agents
Retrieving creator profile statistics from influencer analysis agents
Monitoring brand mentions on Douyin from social listening agents
Analyzing trending topics and hashtags from market research agents
Building Douyin content strategies from marketing agents
Collecting video metadata for Chinese market analysis from analytics agents
not_for: International TikTok (different platform; Douyin is China-specific)
Content publishing or account management at scale (violates ToS)
Teams without China market focus (Douyin content is primarily Chinese language)
best_when: An agent needs to research or analyze Douyin content for China market intelligence — social listening, influencer research, or trend analysis on China's leading short-video platform.
avoid_when: You're focused on international TikTok, non-Chinese markets, or need compliant commercial data access — use official Douyin API for business use.

auth.notes: May use unofficial Douyin API or web scraping. Official Douyin Open Platform requires Chinese business license for API access. Community MCP may use unofficial endpoints.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Public content access is free; official API requires business account
pricing.paid_tiers: Douyin Open Platform: business licensing required for commercial access
pricing.notes: Unofficial/public API access is free. Official Douyin Open Platform requires Chinese business entity registration. Community MCP may use unofficial endpoints subject to ToS risks.

performance.rate_limits: Unofficial API: informal limits; aggressive access may be blocked by Douyin

known_agent_gotchas: Uses unofficial Douyin API — ToS compliance risk; may be blocked by Douyin without warning
Data and API calls go to Douyin/ByteDance servers in China — data sovereignty implications
Documentation primarily in Chinese — barrier for non-Chinese-speaking teams
Official Douyin API requires Chinese business license — most international users cannot get it
Community MCP with uncertain maintenance — Douyin API changes frequently
Douyin content moderation policies differ significantly from Western platforms
agent_readiness.security_notes: Data processed by ByteDance/Douyin servers in China. Unofficial API — ToS risk. Community MCP. Review data sovereignty requirements. Not suitable for sensitive corporate use where data residency matters.

security_score_components.security_notes: Data in China (ByteDance). Unofficial API. Community MCP. ToS risk. Review data sovereignty requirements.
